category_sources: source_facts.description says bsdiff generates and applies patches to binary files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bsdiff; source_facts.homepage is the official bsdiff page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official bsdiff page and best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official source_facts.homepage/source-archive identify a release page and tarball, not an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies binary patch generation/application; source_facts.executables and current_curation.tags indicate CLI usage.
